# System status

<!-- GENERATED by scripts/refresh-docs.mjs — do not edit by hand. -->

> **Configuration check only — this is not a health check.**
> A key being present means it exists in the local `backend/.env`. It does not mean
> the service is reachable, the key is valid, or the quota is intact. The 13-day
> silent outage in June had every key configured the whole time.

Last commit: **2026-06-30**

<!-- TODO: deploy timestamp requires the Railway API; commit date is a proxy. -->

## Service keys

| Key | Local config |
|---|---|
| `ALLOWED_EMAIL` | configured |
| `ALPACA_API_KEY` | configured |
| `ALPACA_PAPER` | configured |
| `ALPACA_SECRET_KEY` | configured |
| `ALPHA_VANTAGE_KEY` | configured |
| `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` | configured |
| `CORS_ORIGINS` | configured |
| `DATABASE_URL` | configured |
| `SCHWAB_CLIENT_ID` | configured |
| `SCHWAB_CLIENT_SECRET` | configured |
| `SUPABASE_URL` | configured |

_Values are never read or printed — presence only._

_11 of 11 documented keys configured locally. Production values live in Railway and are not visible here._


> ⚠ **1 key(s) set in `backend/.env` but missing from `.env.example`:**
> `FINNHUB_API_KEY`
> A new contributor copying `.env.example` would not know these are needed.
